TemplatesPage.title: Choose Your Template
TemplatesPage.description: Select a professional template that best represents your style and industry. You can preview how your resume will look and change templates later.
TemplatesPage.helpText: Don't worry! You can change your template at any time during the creation process.
TemplatesPage.noTemplatesMatch: No templates match {query}. Try adjusting your search terms or category filter.
TemplatesPage.noTemplatesMatchCurrentFilters: No templates match your current filters. Try selecting a different category or clearing your filters.
